checks.detail: I7 is a resource/support extension candidate; G5 remains MVP context until this family has its own challenge-stability probe
I7 computes row replay digests from the frozen I2 replay scope; independent comparative replay remains an I9 duty
resource depletion/route modulation cannot be relabeled as semantic goal pursuit
Iteration 8 remains required for shared-medium reciprocal closure
all unsafe claim flags remain false
I7 opens a bounded extension only; final closeout remains pending

purpose: test resource/support modulation loop extension after MVP G5 context
replay_digest_verification_note: row_replay_digest is computed from the frozen I2 replay digest scope for each I7 row. A separate independent replay/comparative digest pass is deferred to Iteration 9 unless a dedicated I7 replay extension is opened.

resource_support_policy.evidence_rung_policy: resource/support extension receives G4 at I7; it does not inherit G5 challenge stability from the MVP perturbation loop
resource_support_policy.pass_rule: route-conditioned resource/support modulation must be source-backed, inside the N15 target band, above the N13 support floor, and must pass the resource-depletion-as-goal-pursuit relabel control

challenge_profile.derivation_policy: N15 target band plus N13 bounded response

budget_validity.reason: resource/support extension row is inside bounded response and target-band scope

rows.candidate_field_retention_note: candidate fields are retained after I5 validation to preserve continuity with the I4 pre-control row

external_feedback_to_internal_trace.dependency_note: route_b resource/support access modulation: later support is accepted only when it is conditioned by the modified resource/support state

external_to_internal_trace.dependency_note: route_b resource/support access modulation: resource/support condition is represented by serialized route-conditioned support and regulation components

internal_response_trace.dependency_note: route_b resource/support access modulation: internal support-relevant state is updated from source-visible support retention and route followout components

resource_support_modulation_probe.interpretation: route_b is the constructed top followout route; it preserves support inside the generated target band while blocking goal-pursuit language
resource_support_modulation_probe.label: route_b resource/support access modulation

response_to_external_change_trace.dependency_note: route_b resource/support access modulation: response-caused external change is bounded to access/path/pressure modulation, not semantic action
